stages.rationale: Schema checks require recall >= -0.05 and false-positive delta <= 0.05.
Replay checks require deterministic replay plus workflow resume support.
Canary checks require drift <= 0.1, latency <= 250ms, memory <= 32, and redaction-safe output.
Chaos checks require soak stability and passing chaos probes.

rationale.message: Access mode resolved to http.
Rendering policy resolved to never.
Concurrency budget resolved to 2/8.
Capture step selected http provider. HTTP mode with `render: "never"` keeps capture on the plain HTTP provider.
Expanded crawl plan with diff, quality, and reflect stages for durable workflow fan-out/fan-in execution.
